metadata.description: Find the responsible German authority (Zustellpunkt) for a public service in any area, powered by the fit-connect-cli (FIT-Connect Routing API)

plugins.name: fit-connect
plugins.description: Resolve which German authority is responsible for a public service in a given place, look up area codes (ags/ars/areaId), and build citizen-facing service briefings — all over the open, key-free FIT-Connect Routing API via the fit-connect-cli.
